name: Posole & Sausages
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Black pepper; or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each sausage into 4 pieces. Place in a 3-quart pot, place over medium heat on the stove and cook for 5 minutes.
2. Pour off and discard the fat; reserve the sausages on a plate.
3. Add the onions and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes, or until the onion softens.
4. Halve the tomatoes cross‑wise, lay each half cut side down, and cut each half into 6ths. Add the tomatoes and tomato paste to the pot and cook, stirring, for 2 minutes.
5. Add the hominy, oregano, salt, pepper, and hominy liquid. Cover, raise the heat to high, and bring to a boil.
6. Lower the heat to medium and simmer for 20 minutes.
7. When dinner is ready, return the sausages to the pot and cook for an additional 7 minutes.
8. Remove from the heat; add the parsley. Divide the ingredients between 4 soup bowls and garnish with lime slices. Serve warm tortillas instead of bread.
